text:
Relegate (, rom. Rerugēto) is a spell card that can be found in the Greed Island game, that allows for a player to transport the target player to a random place anywhere on the island.
__NOTOC__

Summary

This card randomly transports a target player to a random place within Greed Island. This card can be useful to prevent an enemy from attacking without needing to leave one's current position. It can also be used on a team-mate in order to discover a new location.

{| class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0"

|No.1012 :: 
対象プレイヤー1名を島のどこかへ飛ばす。
|-
![Eng]
|No.1012 :: Relegate 
Make 1 named target player fly somewhere on the island.
|}

Trivia

The illustration of this card is specular to that of "Leave": the player depicted is exactly the same, only facing the opposite direction, with an inverted color scheme for his clothes, and standing against a yellow background instead of an azure one.
